title: Add FalkorDB service to docker-compose
userStory: As an operator, I want FalkorDB running in compose with persistence and resource limits so that Graphiti has a backing store on the VPS.
acceptanceCriteria: compose/docker-compose.yml has a falkordb service using image falkordb/falkordb:latest
Service exposes no host ports; reachable on docker network as falkordb:6379
Named volume falkordb-data is mounted at /data
Healthcheck runs redis-cli ping and reports healthy
Verify: docker compose up -d falkordb && docker compose exec falkordb redis-cli GRAPH.LIST returns empty list, not error
